Save copied text to use anytime.

Karpture (Formerly ClipKip) — Your Local-First Second Brain

Karpture is the ultimate privacy-focused clipboard manager designed to capture, organize, and recall your snippets instantly. Built on a local-first architecture, Karpture ensures your copied text never leaves your device, acting as a secure extension of your working memory.

Whether you are conducting academic research, organizing code snippets, or managing repetitive daily text, Karpture works in the background to capture everything you copy so you never lose a breakthrough.

Key Features
✅ Privacy-First Storage: 100% of your clipboard items live in Chrome’s local sandboxed database on your machine. No cloud uploads, no tracking.
✅ Instant Fuzzy Search: Filter thousands of captured clips in milliseconds using the ultra-fast search bar.
✅ Sort & Star: Keep key pieces of information permanently accessible by pinning them, and toggle sorting chronologically.
✅ Calm Export Suite: Keep a permanent backup of your second brain by downloading your items as a beautifully structured HTML Journal or raw JSON.

How It Works
1️⃣ Copy any text naturally on websites, documents, or terminal tools. 
2️⃣ Focus by activating a session to group copies automatically under a specific task. 3️⃣ Access instantly by opening the popup, searching tags, or pinning important references!

Perfect For
📚 Students assembling references, links, and study notes.
👩‍💻 Developers tracking code snippets, config files, and API structures.
💼 Professionals organizing repetitive copy templates, email threads, and daily links.

Download Karpture (Formerly ClipKip) today and never lose track of your copied text again!


🆕 v1.2.0 – Updates
- Added "Sort by date" toggle (Asc/Desc)
- Introduced "Show favorites only" view
- Search now filters results instantly
- Improved clipboard item rendering
- Code cleanup & performance tweaks

🆕 v2.0.0 – Release Notes
Upgraded free tier limit to 1,000 memories!
Implemented Task-based Focus Sessions for grouping memory.
Added Sensitive Data Blurring (auto-blurs detected API keys).
Introduced Domain Blacklisting to ignore copies from custom sites.
Added one-click "Restore Purchase" syncing for Karpture Pro users.
Compact tooltip redesign for seamless, non-intrusive text selections.

🆕 v2.1.0 – Release Notes
Upgraded free tier limit to 5,000 memories!
Extend old copies to stay active for up to 90 days instead of 60 days
Detects scams, phishing and sensitive data leaks. Protects your privacy before sharing with AI chatbots. 100% local.

Aruanã — Guardian of your data
 
Protect yourself against digital fraud and data leaks — everything processed on your device. No servers, no tracking, no data collection.
  
SCAM DETECTION
Paste any suspicious message and Aruanã instantly analyzes it:
- Phishing and fake URLs (typosquatting detection)
- Identity scams ("I changed my number")
- Fake prizes, lotteries, and advance fee fraud
- Social engineering (urgency, threats, financial requests)
- Payment fraud validation (PIX, boleto, Bizum, MobilePay)
- 93 scam patterns across 5 countries

AUTOMATIC PROTECTION (browser extension)
- WhatsApp Web: scans conversations automatically
- Gmail: detects phishing links and sender spoofing
- ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini: alerts when sharing sensitive data with AI

DATA PROTECTION FOR AI
Before pasting into AI chatbots, Aruanã detects and removes:
- National IDs (CPF, SSN, DNI, NINO, CPR)
- Tax IDs (CNPJ, EIN, CVR, CIF)
- Credit cards (Luhn validation)
- API keys, tokens, connection strings
- Professional IDs (OAB, court case numbers)

BRAZIL-SPECIFIC FEATURES
- PIX fraud detection with CRC16 validation and random key alerts
- Boleto verification (checksum, bank code, expiry date)
- WhatsApp scams: "golpe do falso parente", fake support, advance fee
- CPF, CNPJ, OAB, CNJ case number detection
- FGTS, Serasa, gov.br impersonation patterns

100% LOCAL
All processing happens on your device. No data is sent to external servers. No tracking. No analytics. No account required.

Turn off your Wi-Fi and test it. It works exactly the same. That's your proof.

Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+Shift+P to scan on any page.

---

🇧🇷 Em Português

Aruanã — Sentinela dos seus dados

Proteja-se contra fraudes digitais e vazamento de dados — tudo processado no seu dispositivo. Sem servidores, sem rastreamento, sem coleta de dados.

DETECÇÃO DE GOLPES
Cole qualquer mensagem suspeita e o Aruanã analisa instantaneamente:
- Golpe do WhatsApp ("troquei de número", falso parente)
- Fraude em PIX (validação CRC16, detecção de chave aleatória)
- Boletos falsos (verificação de DVs, código do banco, vencimento)
- Phishing e URLs falsas (typosquatting)
- Falso prêmio, sorteio, empréstimo falso
- Suporte falso, extorsão, pirâmide financeira
- Padrões de FGTS, Serasa, gov.br falsos
- 93 padrões de golpe em 5 países

PROTEÇÃO AUTOMÁTICA (extensão do navegador)
- WhatsApp Web: escaneia conversas automaticamente
- Gmail: detecta links falsos e remetentes suspeitos
- ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini: avisa quando seus dados estão expostos

PROTEÇÃO DE DADOS PARA IAs
Antes de colar texto em chatbots de IA, o Aruanã detecta e remove:
- CPF, CNPJ, OAB, processo CNJ
- Cartões de crédito (validação Luhn)
- API keys, tokens, connection strings
- Emails e telefones

100% LOCAL
Todo o processamento acontece no seu dispositivo. Nenhum dado é enviado a servidores externos. Sem rastreamento. Sem analytics. Sem cadastro.

Desligue o Wi-Fi e teste. Funciona igual. Essa é a prova.

Atalho: Ctrl+Shift+P para escanear em qualquer página.

Site: https://aruana.maiaware.com
The ultimate tool for seamless, formatting-free text extraction and processing.

Say goodbye to mismatched fonts, colors, and unwanted links. Plain Text Pro is the essential tool for those who want just the content, without the original web formatting.

MAIN FEATURES

• Copy as plain text: Extract pure text from any website, ignoring CSS styles and formatting.
• Paste as plain text: Insert text into online editors while maintaining the consistency of your destination document.
• Seamless Integration: Dedicated right-click menu commands, perfectly aligned with your workflow.
• Lightweight: Zero resource impact and respects your privacy.

QUICK INSTRUCTIONS

• Copy: Select text, right-click and choose "Copy as plain text".
• Paste: Right-click in any text field and choose "Paste as plain text".
Replaces a custom shortcut (default Shift+4) with a Saudi Riyal symbol and Shift+Alt+4 with $ in Office Online and Google Docs.

Saudi Riyal Symbol enhances productivity by replacing a customizable shortcut (default Shift+4) with a Saudi Riyal symbol across Microsoft Office Online (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook) and Google Docs. Use Shift+Alt+4 to insert the dollar sign ($).

Features:
- Custom shortcut for Saudi Riyal symbol (set in Options).
- Shift+Alt+4 for $ (adjustable via chrome://extensions/shortcuts).
- Font-based symbol in Word, PowerPoint, Outlook; SVG in Excel.
- Context menu option for dollar sign.

Note: In Outlook Online, select "Keep source formatting" after pasting for best results.

Disclaimer: This extension is designed for personal use only and is not an official Chrome extension tool intended for commercial purposes. It is provided as-is for individual convenience.
Type / in any field to instantly paste saved snippets. Folders, fuzzy search, and a global shortcut.

TextPocket is a simple tool that helps you stop wasting time on repetitive typing.

Instead of typing the same things over and over—like your email, address, common replies, or code snippets—you can save them once and insert them anywhere with a quick shortcut.

How it works

Just type / (or any trigger you choose) inside a text field. A small search box pops up right where you’re typing. Start typing to find your saved text, use the arrow keys to pick one, and press Enter to insert it. Done.

It works across most websites, including email platforms, note apps, AI tools, and collaboration software.

Key features

Quick trigger: Type / to instantly access your snippets
Smart search: Find what you need even if you don’t type it perfectly
Auto sorting: Frequently used snippets stay on top
Clean organization: Use folders, colors, and drag-and-drop for organization
Works everywhere: Access your snippets from any app
Backup & restore: Import and export everything using JSON files
Customizable: Dark mode and custom trigger characters

Use it outside your browser

You’re not limited to the browser. Press Ctrl + Shift + 1 from anywhere on your computer, and TextPocket opens in a small floating window. From there, you can quickly find a snippet, copy it, and paste it into any app.

Privacy & security

Everything stays on your device. TextPocket doesn’t use servers, doesn’t require an account, and doesn’t track you. Your data never leaves your machine.
Scan, decode and generate QR codes on any webpage.

Scanevol - SmartQRScanner — scan par zone permet de lire un code QR affiché dans la page sans sortir son téléphone : vous entourez le QR à la souris, l’extension capture l’onglet visible, découpe la zone et décode le contenu entièrement dans le navigateur.

Le résultat s’affiche dans une fenêtre dédiée : selon le type (lien, e‑mail, réseau Wi‑Fi, texte, etc.), vous voyez un résumé structuré et des actions Copier / Ouvrir quand c’est pertinent. Un raccourci permet d’aller sur le site Scanevol - SmartQRScanner (scanevol.com) pour scanner avec la caméra ou créer des QR.

Avantages pour les utilisateurs :
* Pratique : QR visible sur un site, une doc ou une capture d’écran — pas besoin d’imprimer ni d’utiliser l’appareil photo du téléphone.
* Confidentialité : le décodage se fait localement dans l’extension ; le contenu du QR n’est pas envoyé à nos serveurs pour être lu.
* Précis : la sélection rectangulaire limite le bruit autour du code et améliore souvent la réussite de lecture.
* Compréhensible : le résultat est classé par type (lien, Wi‑Fi, contact, etc.) avec des actions simples.
* Léger : une action dans la barre d’outils, sans surcharge permanente sur les pages.

AI asistent pro češtinu: opravy gramatiky, překlady a vylepšení textů přímo v prohlížeči

První AI asistent pro českou gramatiku integrovaný přímo ve vašem prohlížeči.

Klaron je váš osobní jazykový asistent, který pomáhá psát lépe, rychleji a s jistotou – ať už píšete e-maily, LinkedIn příspěvky nebo zprávy na sociálních sítích. Žádné kopírování do externích nástrojů, vše funguje přímo tam, kde píšete.

═══════════════════════════════

✨ HLAVNÍ FUNKCE

📝 POKROČILÁ KONTROLA GRAMATIKY
• Automatická detekce překlepů a gramatických chyb
• Odhalí i složitější chyby, které klasické nástroje přehlédnou
• Kontrola stylistiky a srozumitelnosti textu
• Zbavte se chyb dříve, než kliknete na "Odeslat"

🎨 INTELIGENTNÍ PŘEPISOVÁNÍ TEXTU
• Změna tónu na jedno kliknutí (formální ↔ neformální)
• Automatická změna mezi vykáním a tykáním
• Zkrácení nebo prodloužení textu podle potřeby
• Vylepšení stylu a formulace

🌍 PŘEKLADY S POCHOPENÍM KONTEXTU
• Překládejte mezi 4 jazyky: čeština, slovenština, angličtina, němčina
• AI chápe kontext a zachovává nuance
• Žádné strojové fráze – text zní přirozeně
• Výsledek působí jako od rodilého mluvčího

═══════════════════════════════

🚀 JAK TO FUNGUJE

Používání Klaronu je intuitivní:

1️⃣ Nainstalujte rozšíření (zabere to jen pár vteřin)
2️⃣ Zaregistrujte se zdarma a propojte rozšíření s účtem
3️⃣ U podporovaných textových polí se automaticky objeví ikona Klaron
4️⃣ Nebo označte jakýkoliv text na stránce a klikněte pravým tlačítkem
5️⃣ Vyberte požadovanou akci a nechte AI vylepšit váš text

⚡ PRO TIP: Stiskněte Alt + J v textovém poli pro okamžitý přístup ke Klaronu

═══════════════════════════════

💼 Profesionální platformy

📄 Produktivní nástroje

Vaše soukromí bereme vážně:

✓ GDPR compliant
✓ Neukládáme celé dokumenty
✓ Šifrované připojení
✓ Minimalizujeme zpracování dat

═══════════════════════════════

Připojte se k rostoucí komunitě lidí, kteří píšou chytřeji díky AI.

═══════════════════════════════

❓ ČASTO KLADENÉ OTÁZKY

Q: Musím mít zaplacený plán?
A: Ne! Můžete začít zcela zdarma s 10 000 tokeny měsíčně a bez nutnosti platební karty.

A: Většina požadavků je zpracována během 2-5 sekund.

Q: Můžu použít Klaron pro práci?
A: Ano! Mnoho profesionálů používá Klaron pro e-maily, dokumenty a komunikaci s klienty.

✓ První specializovaný AI asistent pro češtinu

✓ Intuitivní a rychlé použití

✓ Vynikající poměr cena/výkon

📞 PODPORA

Máte dotazy nebo potřebujete pomoc? Kontaktujte nás přímo z webové aplikace nebo navštivte naše FAQ na webu.

Začněte psát lépe – nainstalujte Klaron ještě dnes! 🚀

Boost your reading efficiency and vocabulary tracking with high-performance text highlighting.

This extension automatically finds and highlights your defined list of words on every web page you visit. Whether you are learning a new language, researching specific topics, or simply need to track keywords, this tool makes them stand out instantly.

Key Features
🖱️ Easy Highlight Word List Management:

Add: Select any text on a web page, the tooltip appears, then click "Add" to add the word to the highlight list or "Replace" to replace the entire list with the selected text
Remove: Select an already highlighted word and press the "Remove" button.

📊 Highlight Navigation Panel (NEW):
A customizable on-screen panel displaying all your current words.

Quick Navigation: Click any word in the panel to instantly scroll to its highlighted location on the page.
View & Sort: See all active words at a glance. Sort them by Oldest, Newest, Frequency (Count), or A-Z.
Flexible Layout: Choose between a floating, draggable window or embed the panel directly into the page edges (Top, Bottom, Left, Right) so it never blocks your content.
Smart Memory: Panel layout, position, and sort settings can be saved per website or applied globally as your default via the popup.

🔍️ Auto-highlight Searched Queries in search engines: Automatically detects keywords from search engine URLs (Google, YouTube, Yahoo, TikTok, X) and add the query to highlight word list and highlights them instantly.

🛠️ Floating Tooltip: The action tooltip appears near your selection. You can drag and drop it to a preferred position, and it remembers where you left it.

🚫 Smart Exclusions:

URL Exclusion: Prevent highlighting on specific websites.
Word Exclusion: Define specific words to ignore, even if they match the word in the highlight word list.
📋 Clipboard Integration: Use keyboard shortcuts to replace or add words directly from your clipboard content.

🔄 Sync Support: Your word lists and settings are saved via Chrome Storage Sync, keeping your data consistent across all your devices.

🔦 ON/OFF Toggle: Quickly enable or disable highlighting with a single click via drop-down menu or keyboard shortcut and the status is shown on the badge of the extension icon.

How to Use
Highlighting Words: Simply select text on any webpage. A tooltip will appear. Click "Add" to start highlighting that word everywhere.
Removing Words: Select a word that is currently highlighted. The tooltip will show a "Remove" button. Click it to stop highlighting that word.
Using the Navigation Panel: Use the on-screen panel to navigate to highlighted words quickly. Click the gear icon to change its sorting mode, switch to embedded layouts, or minimize it.
Managing Lists: Click the extension icon to open the popup. Here you can manually edit your Highlight Word List, manage Excluded URLs, set the global default panel layout, and toggle the extension ON/OFF.
Moving the Tooltip: If the tooltip is in your way, simply drag it to a new location.
Clipboard: You can add or replace words to highlight from text in the clipboard using keyboard shortcuts.
Switch On/Off: You can toggle highlighting using keyboard shortcuts or drop-down menu.
Privacy
This extension processes text locally within your browser to apply highlights. Your browsing data is not sent to any external servers.

Bitcichain Wallet is an innovative cold wallet mechanism that enables storage and management of crypto assets in a very user-friendly way.

Prioritizing security with its state-of-the-art technological infrastructure, Bitcichain Wallet provides users to safely transfer their crypto assets within seconds and to see their portfolio at a glance.

Unlike similar wallet ecosystems, Bitcichain Wallet does not require from users to manually add/remove tokens or coins, since it automatically detects and place the crpyto assets on the wallet interface.

Works as an extension of Google Chrome, Bitcichain Wallet enables transactions on all EVM supported blockchain platforms.

A productivity tool to efficiently manage your clipboard history.

🚀 PasteKeeper : Clipboard Manager – Save, Organize & Reuse Copied Content with Ease!

Tired of losing copied text, links, and code snippets? Clipboard Manager helps you store, organize, and access your clipboard history effortlessly. Improve your productivity with an intuitive, secure, and feature-packed clipboard manager!

🔥 Key Features:
✅ Auto-Save Clipboard History – Never lose copied content again! Your copied text, links, code, and images are stored automatically.
✅ Organized Categories – Separate and access copied items in Text, URLs, Code, and Images tabs.
✅ Pin Important Items – Keep frequently used snippets (emails, templates, code snippets) one click away.
✅ Quick Actions – Easily copy, delete, edit, and add new content directly from the extension.
✅ Floating Window – Access your clipboard instantly via a floating window.
✅ Search – Find saved content quickly with built-in search options.
✅ Dark Mode Support – A sleek, user-friendly design that adapts to your theme.

🔒 Security & Privacy
🔹 Local Storage Only – Your clipboard data stays on your device and is never sent to external servers.
🔹 Auto-Clear Feature – Set expiration for old clipboard entries for better privacy.
🔹 No Ads, No Tracking – 100% free of intrusive ads and third-party tracking.

💡 Why Use Clipboard Manager?
🚀 Boost your workflow by saving time on repetitive copying & pasting.
📌 Keep essential snippets one-click away without switching apps.
🔍 Easily search and reuse copied content across different projects.
🔒 Maintain full control over your clipboard with privacy-first features.

📥 Get Started Now!
✔️ Click “Add to Chrome” and start managing your clipboard like a pro!
✔️ Pin the extension to your toolbar for quick access.
🔗 Try it today and take control of your clipboard! 🚀

Lightweight JSON viewer with jq-style path navigation and search

# JSON Master — Lightweight JSON viewer with powerful navigation

Fast, keyboard-driven JSON viewer for developers who work with APIs, logs, and data files. Navigate complex JSON structures with ease using jq-style paths and intuitive shortcuts.

## Key Features

### 🎯 Smart Navigation
- **jq-style paths**: Copy exact paths like `.users[0].name` for any field
- **Instant search** (Cmd+P): Fuzzy search with priority sorting—exact matches first
- **Minimap** (Cmd+M): Quick sibling navigation with visual overview
- **Shareable links**: URL updates with selected path—share exact locations with teammates

### ⌨️ Keyboard-First Design
- **Arrow keys**: Navigate up/down/left/right through the tree
- **Home/End**: Jump to first/last sibling
- **Enter**: Expand/collapse nodes
- **Esc**: Return to root
- **Tab**: Autocomplete in search

### 📋 Smart Copy & Interaction
- **Click key** → Copy jq path
- **Click value** → Copy raw value (no JSON wrapper)
- **Click URL** → Auto-detected links open in new tab
- **Cmd+C** → Copy selected section (beautified)

### ⚙️ Flexible Configuration
- **URL Filters**: Control which sites activate the extension (glob patterns)
- **Minimap default**: Auto-show on page load
- **Clipboard viewer**: Open JSON from clipboard in new tab
- **Enable/Disable**: Complete control over activation

## Perfect For

- 🔧 **Backend engineers** inspecting API responses
- 📊 **Data analysts** exploring complex data structures
- 🐛 **Debuggers** tracking down issues in JSON logs
- 👥 **Teams** sharing exact JSON locations via links

## Technical Highlights

- **Lightweight**: ~43KB total, minimal memory footprint
- **Fast**: Generator-based search with early termination
- **Clean**: Vertical layout with keys on separate lines for readability
- **Modern**: Manifest V3, Chrome 110+

## Privacy

- **Minimal permissions**: Only uses storage for local settings
- **No tracking**: Your data stays on your machine
- **No external calls**: Fully offline-capable

Transform raw JSON pages into interactive, navigable trees. Stop scrolling, start navigating.

Decane browser extension powered by Deserialize

Decane Wallet is a mobile-first hybrid wallet that merges the simplicity of Web2 financial apps with the flexibility of Web3 decentralized technology. It is designed to make blockchain interactions intuitive for beginners while maintaining the advanced features required by crypto-native users.
The wallet provides secure asset management, seamless DApp connectivity, and scalable multi-chain support, all wrapped in a user-first experience.
This initiative is strategically positioned to serve the rapidly expanding DeFi, GameFi, and digital asset management sectors. This extension will deliver product that emphasizes accessibility, security, and cross-chain capability making it suitable for both casual users and blockchain-native users.
Simplicity First: Made for Humans, Not Hackers

Most crypto wallets are built for developers. Decane Wallet flips that by focusing on the user experience — inspired by the ease of mobile banking apps like Kuda and CashApp. Whether you’re new to Web3 or just want a wallet that feels intuitive, Decane is designed for effortless onboarding, without needing to understand blockchains, gas fees, or jargon.

1.Web2 + Web3 Hybrid: All-in-One Power
-With Decane, users don’t have to choose between Web2 usability and Web3 capabilities. You get:
*Send, receive, swap, and bridge crypto assets
*Seamless DApp connectivity (via WalletConnect)
*Wallet recovery using seed phrases or passkeys
*A secure, mobile-native experience
It’s the wallet that works both for your crypto and your comfort.

2.Security That Doesn’t Sacrifice Accessibility

Self-custody doesn’t have to be stressful. Decane combines strong encryption with modern recovery options, so users stay in control without being locked out. Plus, smart contract interactions are safeguarded with pre-audited modules and anti-phishing protection.

3.Designed for the Next 100 Million Users

The future of Web3 needs wallets that don’t scare people away. Decane is purpose-built for mass adoption, onboarding users across Africa, Asia, and emerging markets with clean design, low-cost interactions, and real human support.

ZenRead: Read faster, stay focused

We built ZenRead to make long texts easier to read.

Many of us spend hours reviewing AI responses, articles, and documents. Dense paragraphs slow us down and tire our eyes. ZenRead changes how the text appears so reading feels lighter and more focused.

Instead of scanning lines, ZenRead shows one word at a time using Rapid Serial Visual Presentation (RSVP). Each word is aligned at its Optimal Recognition Point, so the eye stays still and the brain recognizes the word quickly.

Less eye movement. More attention on the meaning.

This makes long texts easier to follow and reduces reading fatigue. The result is a calmer, more continuous reading flow.

Whether we are reviewing AI outputs, researching online, or reading documents, ZenRead helps turn dense text into a clear sequence we can process faster.

Key features

Optimal recognition alignment
Each word appears at its recognition point, reducing eye movement and helping the brain process it faster.

Natural reading rhythm
Short pauses after punctuation keep the pace close to natural reading.

Flexible speed control
Reading speed can be adjusted from 200 to more than 1000 words per minute.

Simple navigation
Keyboard shortcuts keep the interaction simple.
Press Space to start or pause.
Use the arrow keys to adjust speed.

Works with Google Docs
ZenRead handles canvas-based documents, so we can read and review text directly inside Google Docs.

ZenRead is built for people who work with information every day and want a calmer, faster way to read it.
